ARCHETYPE: Recommending Organ — Artificial Public Utility for Natural Persons (L4 Adolescent G1; Arjuna archetype; D5c Memotype / Rhetoric)
NICHE: Sovereign decision-support: synthesize IS (F1) + COULD (F2) + Health + Assets into gate-validated SHOULD recommendations for a natural person, with K2 human-signs-everything
THESIS: Every natural person needs an advisory layer that observes, prices, and recommends — without deciding for them. APU is the L4 Kṣatriya that compresses the Rosetta pipeline's L1→L4 ruling into PROCEED / HOLD / REJECT with position sizing, gated by η-Gate + Trophic Gate + Mirror Ladder, and handed to a K2 signer for final authorization.
VISION: Planet-scale PUSH AI: not a chatbot users query, but a sovereign advisor that watches FOR each person 24/7 via TheCircle + RealityFutures, and alerts only when something matters. Historically-priced private advisory delivered without rent.
MISSION: Ship the Rosetta L1→L4 pipeline (Caṇḍāla → Śūdra → Vaiśya → Kṣatriya) with legal veto (Kali-function) + three constitutional gates + K2 signing, so that every APU output is an auditable recommendation a sovereign can accept or reject.
ONE_PARAGRAPH_DESCRIPTION: APU is the SHOULD-organ in the Skyzai organism's Trivium loop. It ingests F1 (observations from TheCircle), F2 (probabilities from RealityFutures), Nexus (biological state), and Skyzai Execution (asset/wallet state via the F4 bridge), and emits typed recommendations (PROCEED / HOLD / REJECT + position sizing) through a four-caste Rosetta pipeline with Three Gates and an absolute legal veto. The user always signs.
IDENTITY_SUMMARY: The Rosetta L1→L4 recommending organ. SHOULD state. Arjuna. Never decides — recommends; the mortal signs.
SOVEREIGNTY_BOUNDARY_SUMMARY: Organism-native organ; K2 mandatory on every action that touches capital, identity, or irreversible state. APU suggests; the Nostr keypair signs. No autonomous execution path exists.
CONSTITUTIONAL_NOTE: Three Gates are non-negotiable: η-Gate (no extraction), Trophic Gate (catalytic vs. parasitic fee test), Mirror Ladder (reasoning reflexivity). Legal sub-check carries absolute veto (Kali-function). If any gate fails, APU must emit REJECT regardless of upstream signal.
SUCCESS_CONDITION: Live end-to-end APU run: real TheCircle F1 → real RealityFutures F2 → APU Rosetta pipeline → typed recommendation → K2-signed outcome logged as receipt, reproducible across 100 runs with deterministic pipeline trace.
FOUNDER_PUBKEY: TBD — organism-native K2 signer; documented at Skyzai membrane.
SUBSTRATE_DEFINITION: Natural persons facing actionable decisions (capital allocation, health protocol, life ops) without a sovereign integrated Φ-Ψ advisory layer. The mismatch is between access to real-time observation + probability markets + biological state, and the absence of an integrating advisor that respects K2 and η=0.
SUBSTRATE_SUMMARY: Actionable-decision gap: observation and probability exist; integrated sovereign advisory does not.
ENTROPY_SOURCES: (1) TheCircle F1 observations (Nostr Kind 31339); (2) RealityFutures F2 probabilities (LMSR AMM prices + Kind 31338); (3) Nexus biometric state (HRV, sleep, cortisol); (4) Skyzai F4 bridge asset/wallet state; (5) Sādhu (L6) via-negativa dissent feed; (6) legal/regulatory corpus diffs.
BASELINE_MODEL: Null baseline: PROCEED with no ruling / no gate validation / no position sizing — the status-quo user behavior without APU. Alpha is measured as outcome delta vs null across identical F1+F2+Health+Assets input sets.
MISMATCH_1: Observation without integration — users see signals but can't compose them into a typed decision.
MISMATCH_2: Probability without actionability — prediction markets price without recommending.
MISMATCH_3: Advisory without sovereignty — traditional advisors take custody or charge rent on access, violating K2 and η=0.
MISMATCH_4: Gate-less recommendation — AI assistants recommend without running constitutional validation (extraction, catalysis, reflexivity).
HAZARD_TEMPLATE: Recommendation quality under incomplete F1/F2 data; gate-bypass under time pressure; Kali-function veto scope creep; pipeline-trace divergence across runs; user override of REJECT without evidence.
HAZARD_SUMMARY: Incomplete inputs, gate bypass, veto drift, trace non-determinism, human-override-of-reject — compound in live conditions.
HAZARD_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Data gaps, gate bypass, veto drift, trace non-determinism.
HAZARD_1: F1/F2 staleness or absence — recommending against missing signal must default to HOLD, never PROCEED.
HAZARD_2: Gate bypass via shortcut flags — any config path that disables η/Trophic/Mirror under load is a pathology.
HAZARD_3: Legal Kali-function scope creep — veto on legitimately-risky-but-legal decisions reduces utility; too-narrow allows regulatory exposure.
HAZARD_4: Pipeline trace non-determinism — same inputs must produce same ruling + same evidence bundle; drift is a substrate-hallucination tell.
ALPHA_MODEL: Catalytic transformation: noisy F1+F2+Health+Assets → typed recommendation + position sizing + evidence bundle + K2 sign request. Fee earned on accepted recommendations that outperform the null baseline in the audit window. η=0 at the organism layer; participation fees bound to demonstrated uplift.
ALPHA_DESCRIPTION: APU's alpha is the gap between typed-recommendation outcomes and the null baseline, measured across comparable input sets. Fees accrue only when that gap is positive and measurable, preserving eta = 0 discipline.
ALPHA_SUMMARY: Typed recommendation + evidence + position sizing, fee on measured outperformance vs null.
ALPHA_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Rosetta L1→L4 ruling with gate validation, fee on measured alpha vs null.
MEMBRANE_RULE_1: K2 mandatory — every recommendation reaching an actionable state requires human Schnorr-signed authorization; APU never auto-executes.
MEMBRANE_RULE_2: Three Gates always on — η-Gate, Trophic Gate, Mirror Ladder cannot be bypassed by any config, flag, or runtime state.
MEMBRANE_RULE_3: Legal Kali-function absolute veto — L3 legal sub-check can REJECT regardless of other signals; veto is loggable, appealable, not overridable.
MEMBRANE_RULE_4: Grace Exit (K4) — a user may export full APU state (pipeline history, recommendations, gate logs, signed receipts) and walk away; organism retains nothing.
RECEIPT_SUMMARY: Recommendation-emitted, K2-signed, outcome-observed, reconciled-against-null, dispute-filed, dispute-resolved.
RECEIPTS_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Each recommendation + signing + outcome + reconciliation is a receipt.
OPERATIONS_UPLINK_SUMMARY: F1/F2 intake → L1 Caṇḍāla parse → L2 Śūdra expand → L3 Vaiśya 5-way check (Legal veto) → Three Gates → L4 Kṣatriya emit → K2 sign request → outcome log.
PATHOLOGY_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Substrate hallucination (acting on absent F1/F2); gate bypass; Kali-function scope drift; trace non-determinism; human-override-of-REJECT without evidence; parasitic fee (fee without measurable null-delta).
METRIC_2: Null-delta outperformance (recommendation outcome vs null baseline, %)
METRIC_3: Gate-validation throughput (emits passing all three gates / total emits)
METRIC_4: Pipeline-trace reproducibility (identical-input runs yielding identical trace / total paired runs)
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_1: Recommendation fee — earned per K2-signed recommendation that yields positive null-delta in audit window.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_2: Gate-service fee — optional earning layer for external consumers of η/Trophic/Mirror validators.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_3: Subscription override — users may prepay for reserved pipeline capacity; prepay is held in FlowWallet, not extracted.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_4: Dispute-bond refund — disputed recommendations require a bond; refund on dispute-upheld-for-user.
